languages.text: "Погребальная процессия проходит по улицам улья с молитвами, что разносятся единой песней скорби по всему миру. И поднимаются усопшие на поверхность, многие — впервые на своем веку. Место их — на ритуальных плитах, где почившие ждут взошествия Огненной Посланницы, священной звезды Ноллы, что одарит своим ослепляющим поцелуем каждого, и направит их души к Бессмертному во служение".

traits.locale_text: "Погребальная процессия проходит по улицам улья с молитвами, что разносятся единой песней скорби по всему миру. languages.text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."
languages.original_text: "Погребальная процессия проходит по улицам улья с молитвами, что разносятся единой песней скорби по всему миру. languages.text: "Ein Leichenzug marschiert durch die Straßen des Bienenstocks und singt Gebete, die als Hymne der Trauer durch die ganze Welt hallen. Die Verstorbenen werden an die Oberfläche gebracht, viele von ihnen zum ersten Mal in ihrem ganzen Leben. Die Verstorbenen nehmen ihre Plätze auf den rituellen Platten ein, wo sie auf den Aufstieg des Feurigen Boten warten, Nollas gesegnetem Stern, der die Verstorbenen mit seinen feurigen Küssen überschüttet und ihre Seelen dem Unsterblichen übergibt, damit sie ihm für immer dienen können."
languages.original_text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."

languages.text: "Un cortège funèbre défile dans les rues de la ruche en chantant des prières qui résonnent dans le monde entier comme un hymne de deuil. Les défunts sont ramenés à la surface, beaucoup d'entre eux pour la première fois de leur vie. Les défunts prennent place sur les dalles rituelles où ils attendent l'ascension du Messager ardent, l'étoile bénie de Nolla qui couvre les défunts de ses baisers ardents et livre leurs âmes à l'Immortel, afin qu'ils puissent le servir à jamais."
languages.original_text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."

languages.text: "送葬队伍穿过蜂巢街道，吟唱着响彻整个世界的祈祷词，如同一首哀悼的赞歌。逝者被带到地面上，其中许多人都是生平第一次。逝者在祭祀石板上就位，等待火信使的升天，诺拉的祝福之星用火吻沐浴逝者，将他们的灵魂交给不朽者，让他们永远为不朽者服务。"
languages.original_text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."

languages.text: "Un cortejo fúnebre marcha por las calles de la colmena entonando oraciones que resuenan por todo el mundo como un himno de duelo. Los difuntos son sacados a la superficie, muchos de ellos por primera vez en toda su vida. Los difuntos ocupan sus lugares en las losas rituales donde esperan la ascensión del Mensajero Ardiente, la estrella bendita de Nolla que baña a los difuntos con sus besos ardientes y entrega sus almas al Inmortal, para que puedan servirle eternamente".
languages.original_text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."

languages.text: "葬列は、弔いの賛歌として全世界に響き渡る祈りを唱えながら、ハイブの通りを行進する。死者の多くは生まれて初めて表舞台に姿を現す。亡き人たちは儀式用のスラブの上に座り、炎の使者の昇天を待つ。ノーラの祝福の星は、亡き人に炎のキスを浴びせ、その魂を不滅の神に届け、永遠に彼に仕えることができるようにするのだ。
languages.original_text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."

languages.text: "Bir cenaze alayı kovan sokaklarında bir yas ilahisi olarak tüm dünyada yankılanan dualar okuyarak yürüyor. Ölenler yüzeye çıkarılıyor, birçoğu hayatları boyunca ilk kez. Merhumlar ritüel levhalar üzerindeki yerlerini alır ve burada Ateşli Haberci'nin yükselişini beklerler; Nolla'nın kutsanmış yıldızı merhuma ateşli öpücüklerini yağdırır ve sonsuza dek ona hizmet edebilmeleri için ruhlarını Ölümsüz'e teslim eder."
languages.original_text: "A funeral procession marches through the hive streets chanting prayers that resonate through the entire world as a hymn of mourning. The deceased are brought out to the surface, many of them for the first time in their entire lives. The departed take their places on the ritual slabs where they wait for Fiery Messenger's ascension, Nolla's blessed star that showers the deceased with its fiery kisses and delivers their souls to the Immortal, so they can serve him forevermore."
